setting.help: Rounding applied when tracking your time using the timer

div.title: Time entries recorded using the timer that fall short of the minimum duration will be automatically adjusted to the set value. For instance, if you pause the timer at 00:05:36, the time entry will be rounded up to 00:15 (given a minimum duration of 15 minutes). It's advisable to keep the same value for both the minimum duration and the rounding up.

label.class: o_form_label o_light_label col-6 col-sm-4 col-md-2 col-lg-4

div.title: Timesheet durations recorded using the timer will be rounded up to the specified value. For example, if you halt the timer at 00:16:56, the timesheet duration will be automatically adjusted to 00:30 (assuming a rounding up value of 15 minutes). It's advised to maintain consistency between the minimum duration and the rounding up value.

label.class: o_form_label o_light_label col-6 col-sm-4 col-md-2 col-lg-4
